prompt:
Editorial premium social media card, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350px), inspired by Function Health 'QUICK QUESTION' series adapted to a deep forest + gold palette.

BACKGROUND: Solid deep forest color #000F08 covering the entire canvas. Optionally a very subtle, barely perceptible scientific microscopy texture at ~8% opacity (organic cellular patterns, not geometric). NO visible border or frame around the card edges.

LAYOUT (top to bottom, centered alignment):

1) BADGE at top, horizontally centered, approximately 18% from top edge: A thin rectangular outlined badge with 1px stroke in gold #C89136, internal padding generous. Inside the badge, the text 'FAIXA FUNCIONAL' rendered in DM Sans Regular weight 400, uppercase, letter-spacing +0.12em, font size approximately 11px, color #C89136 gold. The badge width should hug the text snugly.

2) HEADLINE in the visual center of the canvas, large editorial serif italic typography: 'Seu ApoB está 95. Dentro da faixa do laboratório. Por que ainda preocupa?'
   - Render in Georgia Light Italic (or Source Serif Pro Light Italic 300), size 56-64px, line-height 1.15, letter-spacing -0.02em
   - First two sentences ('Seu ApoB está 95. Dentro da faixa do laboratório.') in off-white #f8fffc
   - The final question 'Por que ainda preocupa?' in gold #C89136 (still italic, same font)
   - Text wraps naturally across 3-4 lines, centered

3) SUBLINE below headline with breathing room (~40px gap): 'Faixa de laboratório ≠ faixa de risco cardiovascular ótimo.' in DM Sans Light weight 300, 16px, line-height 1.5, color #f8fffc at 60% opacity, centered, single line or wrapping cleanly.

4) RESERVE EMPTY SPACE at bottom-center, approximately 5% padding from bottom edge, a clean horizontal area roughly 25-28% of canvas width and proportional height — this space MUST be left empty/clean (solid background only) for a logo to be composited in post-production. DO NOT generate any logo, wordmark, text, or graphic in this reserved bottom area.

TYPOGRAPHY DISCIPLINE: Pixel-perfect text rendering. No artifacts, no fake serifs, no garbled characters. Portuguese characters (á, ê, ç) must render correctly.

MOOD: Editorial, restrained, premium medical-scientific. Aesop-meets-Function-Health. Heavy negative space. Quiet authority.

ABSOLUTELY NO: no people, no human figures, no portraits, no visible card border or frame, no bullet points, no DM Sans on the headline (headline MUST be serif italic), no drop shadows on text, no heart icons, no charts, no graphs, no stethoscopes, no medical icons, no pure white #FFFFFF anywhere (use off-white #f8fffc), no emojis, no decorative flourishes, no gradients on the background, no test tubes, no pills, no molecules floating, no glow effects, no logo in the reserved bottom area.
notes: Single static post. Logo will be overlaid in post-process at bottom-center, 25-28% width, 5% bottom padding using assets/logos/longevify-horizontal-white.png
